content: Deceased: Mr. Arjun Mehta, 58, male. Cause of Death: Multiple blunt force traumas consistent with high-velocity vehicular impact. Primary injuries: Fractured skull, bilateral rib fractures, pelvic fracture, internal hemorrhage. No defensive wounds. No alcohol or drugs detected in blood. Time of Death: Estimated between 18:50 and 19:00. No signs of prior assault. Clothing: Slight scuff marks on right shoe, consistent with tire tread. No other injuries. Conclusion: Death resulted from being struck by a motor vehicle while crossing a pedestrian crossing. No evidence of pre-existing medical condition contributing to death.
